purpose: P1 contract evaluation: declared keyed resource IDs per trace family. Used only for allowed_keys; not derived from expected_verdicts, annotations, or failure_class labels.
authoring_note: Positive allowlists match each family domain naming. incident_reconstructed registers line_buffer_* only; unknown_* ids used in traces are intentionally omitted as out-of-registry placeholders (scenario design), not inferred from gold labels.
